title: Host-repo learning proof-selection review
scope: Issue #1211 validation-lane review of host-repo proof assumptions, learned route hints, and negative-evidence gaps.
goal: Produce issue #1211 groundwork by identifying the smallest evidence-backed proof-selection and learning gaps that would keep host-repo behavior assumption-shaped.
non_goals: Do not implement fixes in this review pass.
Do not promote findings into active planning or roadmap automatically.
Do not turn the command-generation symptom into a pytest-only design.

review_mode.review question: Does current proof selection distinguish confirmed host-repo evidence from AW-source-repo heuristics before selecting executable proof?
review_mode.inputs inspected first: issue #1211, proof-selection runtime, proof-selection rules, proof-route-hints schema, focused proof CLI tests, and temporary host-repo probes

review_method.commands used: uv run agentic-workspace start --task "Produce a bounded review as groundwork for issue #1211: inspect host-repo assumptions, proof-selection heuristics, learned repo behavior routing, and gaps before implementation." --format json; uv run agentic-workspace skills --target . --task "bounded review issue 1211 host-repo assumptions proof selection memory promotion" --format json; uv run agentic-workspace memory promotion-report --target . --mode remediation --format json; uv run agentic-workspace proof against temporary pyproject-only and tests-dir-only host repos; rg targeted proof-selection and proof-route-hints surfaces.
review_method.evidence sources: src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_primitives.py, src/agentic_workspace/contracts/proof_selection_rules.json, src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/proof_route_hints.schema.json, tests/test_workspace_proof_cli.py, tests/test_workspace_lifecycle_cli.py, issue #1211, and temporary proof CLI output.

references.label: Issue #1211
references.locator: Host-repo behavior must be learned from confirmed evidence, not hard-coded assumptions.

references.label: Proof-selection rules
references.locator: workspace_cli lane, pyproject.toml exact match, fallback_lane

findings.title: Python-looking repo markers still become a required pytest command
findings.summary: Proof selection treats `pyproject.toml`, `pytest.ini`, or `tests/` as a live target test capability and can select `uv run pytest` before the target repo confirms pytest is installed or configured.
findings.evidence: `_target_role_command_candidates` appends `uv run pytest` when `pyproject.toml`, `pytest.ini`, or `tests/` exists (src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_primitives.py:24853). `_target_proof_capabilities` reports Python available on the same marker class (src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_primitives.py:24770). A temporary repo with only `pyproject.toml` and `uv.lock` selected required command `uv run pytest` with route_source `live-adapted-target-capability`; a temporary repo with only `tests/` and changed `llms.txt` did the same.
findings.risk if unchanged: Issue #1211 can be closed by a narrow-looking path while the motivating command-generation failure still reproduces: AW tells agents to run pytest in repos where pytest is absent, then classifies the manual fallback as an add-on rather than treating the command as unconfirmed.
findings.suggested action: Split Python project detection from pytest command confirmation. Treat bare `pyproject.toml` or `tests/` as discovery evidence only; require a declared pytest dependency/config, a runnable probe, a repo-configured proof profile, or previously confirmed repo evidence before selecting `uv run pytest` as required proof.
findings.promotion target: Issue #1211 implementation slice: proof-selection capability model and tests/test_workspace_proof_cli.py regression coverage
findings.promotion trigger: Before any PR claims #1211 proof-selection closure or fixes the command-generation pytest symptom.
findings.post-remediation note shape: shrink to a compact evidence pointer after regression tests cover pyproject-only and tests-dir-only hosts.

findings.title: Unknown host paths inherit the AW `workspace_cli` lane
findings.summary: Unmatched changed paths still fall back to the AW source repo's `workspace_cli` validation lane, which carries targeted-test behavior and package-specific proof command expectations.
findings.evidence: `proof_selection_rules.json` defines `pyproject.toml` as `workspace_cli` and `fallback_lane` as `workspace_cli`. `_proof_selection_for_changed_paths` selects that fallback for every unmatched path (src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_primitives.py:25551). In a temporary host repo with only `tests/`, changed `llms.txt` selected lane `workspace_cli`, adapted `make test-workspace` to `uv run pytest`, and emitted required command `uv run pytest`.
findings.risk if unchanged: Even after pytest detection is tightened, unfamiliar host-repo files can still be interpreted through AW-source-repo semantics, producing proof lanes, command names, and explanations that imply AW knows the host repo's ownership model.
findings.suggested action: Introduce an unknown-host or manual-discovery proof intent for paths that do not match confirmed host config or checked-in AW-owned surfaces. Keep AW-source-repo lanes authoritative only when the target is the AW source checkout or when host config explicitly maps the path.
findings.promotion target: Issue #1211 implementation slice: proof-selection rule contract and host-target classification tests
findings.promotion trigger: When changing proof-selection rules for host-repo learning or adding regression fixtures for unfamiliar repos.
findings.post-remediation note shape: shrink after tests prove unmatched host paths produce discovery/manual verification rather than `workspace_cli` proof.

findings.title: Learned route hints do not yet satisfy the owner/provenance contract
findings.summary: The existing `.agentic-workspace/proof-route-hints.json` surface is advisory and live-confirmed, but it is a product-level route-hint file with limited state. It does not model owner routing, timestamped provenance, scoped applicability, or durable negative evidence.
findings.evidence: Lifecycle init persists `.agentic-workspace/proof-route-hints.json` for package.json scripts (tests/test_workspace_lifecycle_cli.py:538). The schema requires `id`, `intent_type`, `candidate_command`, `source`, `confidence`, and `requires_live_confirmation`, but has no `learned_at`, `confirmed_at`, `confirmed_by`, `applies_to`, `owner`, `negative`, or `superseded_by` fields (src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/proof_route_hints.schema.json). `_confirm_learned_route_hints` classifies hints as `live-confirmed` or `stale-or-unavailable` at runtime without persisting negative/stale evidence or routing it to Memory, config, docs, tests/checks, Planning, or issue follow-up (src/agentic_workspace/workspace_runtime_primitives.py:24479).
findings.risk if unchanged: A pytest-only or live-discovery-only fix can still miss #1211's broader invariant: learned host facts need the right owner and provenance, and absent commands need a path that prevents repeated false proof without inventing another silent product shortcut.
findings.suggested action: Before expanding proof-route-hints, define the owner-routing contract for learned repo facts: when a hint remains ephemeral, when it becomes Memory/config/docs/checks/Planning, and how failed/absent commands become scoped negative evidence. Add schema and tests only after that routing decision is explicit.
findings.promotion target: Issue #1211 design slice: learned-fact ownership/provenance contract plus proof-route-hints or Memory integration tests
findings.promotion trigger: Before adding new first-class learned-route state or claiming the mechanism applies beyond proof selection.
findings.post-remediation note shape: retain until owner-routing is decided, then shrink to the issue/design decision and regression test pointers.

recommendation.promote: Use these findings as implementation groundwork for issue #1211. The first two findings are suitable first-slice acceptance tests; the third should shape the design boundary before expanding persistent learned-route state.
recommendation.defer: Do not promote a roadmap or active planning item from this artifact because issue #1211 already owns the upstream intent.

retention.proof surface: routed issues, planning state, docs, checks, Memory, or a compact retained review stub

review_finding.rule: Use only these headings when a prose finding is needed; keep the canonical fields structured.

field_map.Next owner: execution_summary/follow-on routed to or required_continuation/owner surface

handoff_or_closeout.rule: Prefer structured fields; use this shape only for short human-readable summaries.

validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target <temp pyproject-only repo> --changed pyproject.toml --changed uv.lock --format json
uv run agentic-workspace proof --target <temp tests-dir-only repo> --changed llms.txt --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
drift_log: 2026-05-29: Filled with issue #1211 validation-lane findings after focused source inspection and temporary host-repo proof probes.
